channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.4.1
item.description:
What's New in 1.4.1

  • Fixed model downloads — WhisperKit models now download and install correctly via the setup wizard and Settings
  • Fixed transcription — Transcribe button works properly in both Download and Transcribe tabs
  • Improved model management — Accurate detection, size reporting, and deletion of downloaded models
